room.caption: [44] That's a bit obvious.

stringToShow="Due to Steveroxyou getting stuck, we the construction crew, have had to make some adjustments to the floor plan. We hope this prevents any further unfortunate mishaps. Now, let us all laugh at him." signSize=3
